creator: cullum@sacredheartsc.com
text:
It doesn't look like there is any appetite for the maintainers to merge my patch. But I am still using it to run PostgreSQL 16 with security/krb5 (MIT Kerberos) in my environment for multiple months now without issues.

I run a local poudriere server and just have a build script that applies my patch before running `poudriere-bulk`. Not ideal, but it does the job.
